title: dialium occidentale subsp. occidentale
intro: Dialium occidentale subsp. occidentale, also known as the African ironplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and seeds of the plant are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
